name: year
description: Reference year of the ATUS interview (diary year).
observations: Partition column. Derived from the first four digits of tucaseid.

name: tucaseid
description: ATUS case identification number; primary key that links all ATUS files. First four digits are the interview year.

name: tulineno
description: ATUS person line number identifying each individual within the household.

name: tuactivity_n
description: Activity line number sequencing the activities reported on the diary day.

name: trwhona
description: Who information not asked for activity

name: tuwho_code
description: Code identifying who was present with the respondent during the activity.
